inputs.label: Winner Mean (μ)
inputs.businessContext: Initial skill estimate of the winning player/team

inputs.label: Loser Mean (μ)
inputs.businessContext: Initial skill estimate of the losing player/team

inputs.label: Beta (game randomness)
inputs.businessContext: Amount of randomness in the game; typical value is σ/2

inputs.label: Tau (dynamics factor)
inputs.businessContext: Factor to increase uncertainty over time; typical value is σ/100

inputs.label: Draw Probability
inputs.businessContext: Assumed probability of a draw outcome

formulas.c: Math.sqrt(2 * beta * beta + sigma_winner * sigma_winner + sigma_loser * sigma_loser)
formulas.mu_winner_new: mu_winner + (sigma_winner * sigma_winner / c) * (Math.exp(-((mu_winner - mu_loser) * (mu_winner - mu_loser)) / (2 * c * c)) / (1 + Math.exp(-((mu_winner - mu_loser) / c))))
formulas.sigma_winner_new: Math.sqrt(sigma_winner * sigma_winner * (1 - (sigma_winner * sigma_winner / (c * c)) * (Math.exp(-((mu_winner - mu_loser) * (mu_winner - mu_loser)) / (2 * c * c)) * (1 + Math.exp(-((mu_winner - mu_loser) / c))) / ((1 + Math.exp(-((mu_winner - mu_loser) / c))) * (1 + Math.exp(-((mu_winner - mu_loser) / c)))))))
formulas.mu_loser_new: mu_loser - (sigma_loser * sigma_loser / c) * (Math.exp(-((mu_winner - mu_loser) * (mu_winner - mu_loser)) / (2 * c * c)) / (1 + Math.exp(-((mu_winner - mu_loser) / c))))
formulas.sigma_loser_new: Math.sqrt(sigma_loser * sigma_loser * (1 - (sigma_loser * sigma_loser / (c * c)) * (Math.exp(-((mu_winner - mu_loser) * (mu_winner - mu_loser)) / (2 * c * c)) * (1 + Math.exp(-((mu_winner - mu_loser) / c))) / ((1 + Math.exp(-((mu_winner - mu_loser) / c))) * (1 + Math.exp(-((mu_winner - mu_loser) / c)))))))
